scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import { startVitest } from 'vitest/node'; import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'; const ctx = await startVitest('test', ['src/services/miniapp-bridge.test.ts', 'src/pages/index/index.test.ts', 'src/pages/fitting/index.test.ts', 'src/pages/lipstick/index.test.ts', 'src/pages/result/index.test.ts'], { environment: 'jsdom', plugins: [vue()] }); const code = await ctx?.close(); process.exit(code ?? 0);"
scripts.vitest: node --input-type=module -e "import { startVitest } from 'vitest/node'; import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'; const args = process.argv.slice(1); const filters = args.length > 0 ? args : undefined; const ctx = await startVitest('test', filters, { environment: 'jsdom', plugins: [vue()] }); const code = await ctx?.close(); process.exit(code ?? 0);"
